since_last: 25% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.53%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 25% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.17% · BTC -2.13% · Gold -1.78% · Nasdaq100 -0.88%. 25% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.53%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.53%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -9.59%
cards.body: Leaders: VRT +7.07%, ARM +6.21%, SMR +5.71%, MRVL +5.24%, AMAT +4.89%. Laggards: SPCX -9.59%, SNAP -8.24%, APP -6.87%, AI -6.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.59% at $191.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
